productDisplayName: Clarks Men Vine Call Brown Sandal
description: Comfortable and stylish, these Vine Call leather sandals from clarks are an off-duty essential. Wear this with casual and semi-casual ensembles. Upper Leather forefoot cross straps with cushioned suede leather footbed for all-day comfort Stitch detailing for durable comfort and style Branding on the heel with ergonomic grooves on the footbed Footbed stitched to the outsole for durability Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction Slipper care Clean the leather with a leather brush Clean the suede footbed using a suede brush Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
